errors.unknownKeyword: I do not know the keyword '{keyword}'.
errors.unexpectedEnd: '{keyword}' does not close an open block.
errors.returnOutsideFunction: 'return' can only be used inside a function.
errors.unknownVariable: I cannot find a variable named '{name}'.
errors.invalidCharacter: I did not expect the character '{character}'.
errors.notCallable: Only a function can be called with parentheses.
errors.divideByZero: A number cannot be divided by zero.
errors.invalidOperand: The operator '{operator}' cannot be used with these values.
errors.invalidIndex: Only text, a list, or a map can use an index.
errors.loopLimit: The program stopped because it ran for too many steps.
